parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: { note: 'Replace this placeholder payload with your exported ComfyUI graph.', kling_prompt: $json.kling_prompt, scenario_id: ($json.cli_result && $json.cli_result.metadata && $json.cli_result.metadata.scenario_id) ? $json.cli_result.metadata.scenario_id : 'unknown' } }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ 'Kling prompt submitted to ComfyUI.

Scenario ID: ' + (($node["Parse CLI Envelope"].json.cli_result && $node["Parse CLI Envelope"].json.cli_result.metadata && $node["Parse CLI Envelope"].json.cli_result.metadata.scenario_id) ? $node["Parse CLI Envelope"].json.cli_result.metadata.scenario_id : 'n/a') + '
Endpoint: ' + ($node["Parse CLI Envelope"].json.comfyui_url || 'http://127.0.0.1:8188/prompt') + '

Replace the placeholder HTTP body in "Send to ComfyUI" with your exported graph for real image generation.' }}

={{ $json.cli_result && $json.cli_result.fatal_error ? 'Shorts-engine n8n workflow failed.

' + $json.cli_result.fatal_error + ($json.cli_result.hint ? '
Hint: ' + $json.cli_result.hint : '') : 'Shorts-engine result is ready.

[' + (($json.cli_result && $json.cli_result.format) ? $json.cli_result.format : 'unknown') + '] ' + (($json.cli_result && $json.cli_result.title) ? $json.cli_result.title : 'Untitled') + '

' + (($json.cli_result && $json.cli_result.content) ? $json.cli_result.content : ($json.engine_stdout || 'No content returned.')) }}
